text: 1. No abatement by party's death if right to sue survives. - The death of a plaintiff or defendant shall not cause the suit to abate if the right to sue survives. High Court Amendment-[Allahabad].-At the end of the rule 1 add the following:- "or to proceedings in the original Court taken after the passing of the preliminarydecree where a final decree also requires to be passed having regard to the nature of the suit."
